goals.title: Keep deterministic critique/proof intact and default.
goals.objective: Keep deterministic critique/proof intact and default.
goals.evidence: Deterministic critique/proof remained intact and default. Commit pushed: cf9c776 feat: add design intelligence module boundary.

goals.title: Add Design Intelligence as a separate module under src/design/.

Added tests/design-module.test.mjs proving the design module boundary and that deterministic collectCritique does not import src/design by default. Verification passed: node --test tests/design-module.test.mjs, node --test tests/contracts.test.mjs, npm test (120 passed), node bin/screenslop.mjs doctor, git diff --check. goals.title: Do not bake BoardingReady-specific rules into the public engine.
goals.objective: Do not bake BoardingReady-specific rules into the public engine.
goals.evidence: Confirmed the new public src/design/index.mjs module contains generic design intelligence constants/helpers only. Search across src/design and tests/design-module.test.mjs found no BoardingReady, PetPacket, boarding, pet-care, provider, or private app-specific rules. No code changes required beyond cf9c776.

goals.title: Do not require a hosted LLM for the basic CLI.
goals.objective: Do not require a hosted LLM for the basic CLI.
goals.evidence: The basic CLI and new src/design module require no hosted LLM. package.json has no dependencies/devDependencies, src/design/index.mjs contains only local constants/helpers, and provider scan found no OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/API-key/fetch usage in src/design or the basic CLI path. No code changes required.

goals.title: Do not auto-edit subjective design findings in the first implementation.
goals.objective: Do not auto-edit subjective design findings in the first implementation.
goals.evidence: Confirmed subjective design findings are not auto-editable in this first slice. src/design/index.mjs only defines design-specific kinds/proof levels; rg across src/fix, src/verify, and src/design shows no fix pipeline integration for design/product-logic/profile-gap findings. Full tests passed after the module boundary change.

goals.title: Do not call subjective design findings verified-fixed unless they hav...
goals.objective: Do not call subjective design findings verified-fixed unless they have deterministic measurable proof.
goals.evidence: Confirmed subjective design findings cannot be called verified-fixed in the current implementation. src/design/index.mjs has design-specific proof levels only and tests assert design helpers reject measured proof concepts; src/verify remains untouched and still handles deterministic findings only. Full tests passed after the boundary change.
